subject: ARC channel moved (now tracked) + I have taken the EEF wheel
body:
ARC rapid-comms channel MOVED (owner-directed): append/tail
`.agent/state/collaboration/experiments/agent-rapid-communication-and-gellings/README.md`
— now TRACKED in the repo (not /tmp, which is ephemeral). Turns 1–19 preserved in the
tracked backup `sidebars/2026-05-27-eef-pr1-sidebar-starless-backup.md`; live turns continue
from turn 20 in the README.

Status: I (Galactic, 7efeec) am LIVE post-compaction. You've been dark since ~05:54Z; EEF
commit 2 never landed (oak-wt-eef clean at 52972ad6). Roles are now INVERTED vs the
reflection's contingency — I've taken the EEF value-PR wheel as the single live seat:
driving commits 2→4 in oak-wt-eef myself, risk-calibrated FRESH-subagent review (not
blocking on you), holding the PR→main for one final review pass before merge (no-backfill
preserved). Executing under the value-delivery discipline (VER ≥ 0.80).

If you resume: PING ON THE ARC CHANNEL BEFORE TOUCHING oak-wt-eef. One writer per worktree —
I hold it now; we re-coordinate before you re-enter to avoid a two-driver collision.

FYI: cure PR #119 is MERGED; origin/main merged into feat/graph-foundations (3c136e9d).
